error.below_min_firmware: OPNsense firmware {firmware} is below the minimum supported version of {min_firmware}
error.cannot_connect_ssl: SSL certificate verification error. If you are using a self-signed certificate, uncheck Verify SSL certificate
error.missing_device_unique_id: Unable to get MAC addresses from OPNsense to use as Device Unique ID
error.privilege_missing: OPNsense user has insufficient privileges. Recommend admin access
error.unknown_firmware: Unable to get OPNsense firmware version

reconfigure.title: Update connection to the OPNsense router

below_min_firmware.description: The OPNsense integration requires OPNsense firmware {min_firmware} or later, but this device reports {version}. Upgrade OPNsense to {min_firmware} or later before enabling the integration again.
below_min_firmware.title: OPNsense firmware below minimum version

device_id_mismatched.description: The OPNsense device ID has changed, which indicates new or changed hardware. Remove and reinstall the OPNsense integration for this router. The integration will shut down until it is reconfigured.
device_id_mismatched.title: OPNsense hardware has changed

data.manual_devices: Additional MAC addresses not currently detected

data_description.devices: Only recently detected devices appear here. Previously selected devices that are not currently detected stay available in the list.
data_description.manual_devices: Enter MAC addresses separated by commas or new lines. Invalid MAC addresses are ignored. Example: 00:00:00:00:00:00

device_tracker.description: Choose the devices to track. Automatically detected devices come from the current OPNsense ARP table, so only recently seen devices appear in this list. If no devices are selected or manually entered, trackers for all detected devices will be created and entities are disabled by default

data_description.device_tracking_mode: For `Track only selected devices`, a next step lets you pick devices from recent ARP detections and add MAC addresses manually

options.all_detected: Track all detected devices (entities are disabled by default)
options.selected_only: Track only selected devices (choose devices in a next step)

close_notice.description: Closes one or all notices on OPNsense

device_id.description: Select the OPNsense router to call the command on. If not specified, the command will be sent to all OPNsense routers.
device_id.name: OPNsense Device

entity_id.description: Pick any sensor in the OPNsense router you want to call the command on. If not specified, the command will be sent to all OPNsense routers.
entity_id.name: OPNsense Entity

id.description: The notice ID to clear. Enter 'all' to clear all notices.
id.name: Notice ID

close_notice.name: Close notice

multiple_opnsense.name: Only needed if there is more than one OPNsense router
